[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot shows a close-up portrait of a smiling woman overlaid with social media text and interface elements.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a close-up, selfie-style photo of a woman with long dark hair framing her face, blue eyes, and a broad smile showing teeth. She appears to be looking toward the camera with her head slightly tilted, wearing a light gray or muted-colored top.

Setting:
The background behind her is unclear, with indoor-like soft lighting and a blurred wall or surface. The overall image looks like it is taken from a mobile social media feed, with the portrait centered and UI elements around it.

Visual Details:
The portrait is tinted with a warm filter and has soft, slightly pixelated edges typical of a social media post. Text and icons overlay the image: at the top there is a play-style icon and various status indicators, and at the right side there are search and other circular icons. A large purple handle-style label appears near the lower left of the portrait area, followed by a dark translucent text box with white multi-line text. In the bottom right of the portrait area there are small action icons including a speech bubble and a heart-like element. The overall layout uses a vertical, smartphone aspect ratio, with the photo occupying the upper portion and the caption/comment area below.

Visible Text:

Practical Summary:
The image is a mobile social media screenshot featuring a close-up photo of a smiling woman. Over the photo, there is an account handle and a block of caption text, along with visible app navigation and action icons.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
